_comment: Idle-speed-friction demo: Unit._current_speed now bleeds off via arrival_brake_rate() instead of snapping to zero the instant a unit stops locomoting with no move/chase target (Battle._physics_process's 'no momentum while stationary' guard, scripts/Unit.gd). A lone Cavalry regiment (fast approach, slow-ish brake -- the biggest, clearest decay window of any unit type) charges a single weak Infantry regiment (5 soldiers) and wipes it out in a few strikes; once the last enemy on the field is dead the cavalry has nothing left to chase or march toward, so it goes idle mid-charge with real residual speed still on the clock. hold_space + show_unit_speed (session-only, Settings.set_show_unit_speed_session -- never persisted) put the HUD speed label on screen the whole time: it holds near the charge speed through the brief fight, then visibly counts down over several seconds instead of snapping straight to '0.0 m/s'. drill:true stops Battle._check_victory from pausing the tree once team 1 is wiped out, so the recording keeps running through the whole decay. Deterministic: seed + scripted input + a custom scenario (no default line spawn).
